sn4.12:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. Now on that occasion the Blessed One was teaching the Dhamma while surrounded by a large assembly.sn.i.110
sn4.12:2.1: Then it occurred to Māra the Evil One: "This ascetic Gotama is teaching the Dhamma while surrounded by a large assembly. Let me approach the ascetic Gotama in order to confound them."
sn4.12:2.2: Then Māra the Evil One approached the Blessed One and addressed him in verse:
sn4.12:5.1: Then Māra the Evil One … disappeared right there.
